questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to DNS Internals?
options: Inefficient scaling of Recursive vs Iterative DNS query paths, TLD root servers, and DNS caching TTL bounds.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Recursive vs Iterative DNS query paths, TLD root servers, and DNS caching TTL bounds.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Recursive vs Iterative DNS query paths, TLD root servers, and DNS caching TTL bounds scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
